chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1157 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.08.2023 For orders on MA 6383/2023 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 6384/2023 For hearing of main case Petitioners present in person This petition is based on some understanding reached between the petitioners and Hyderabad Municipal Corporation. The petitioners are occupier of some premises perhaps under the license; however, in a suit filed by them as Civil Suit No. 345 of 1981 it was resolved that after the shifting of existing workshops, the existing place shall then be used for any commercial purpose. The existing occupants as disclosed in the suit according to the petitioners in attendance were not given the respective premises. We are afraid that such intricate questions could not be resolved in these proceedings under Article 199 of the Constitution; If at all any offer was made which was lawful it can be enforced through a civil court which could exercise jurisdiction under the law. However, the present petition in view of the above is not maintainable. The petition is dismissed along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
